reflection.candidate_lesson: When 30-indicator conviction is 100% but green_matches is 0 and hist_hr is 0%, the consensus is a live-only phantom with no historical analog and must be sized to zero, not full conviction.
reflection.mechanism: A 100% live conviction with zero green_matches means no historical instance of this exact indicator configuration has ever resolved profitably — the system is extrapolating into a state space it has never observed. Institutionally this happens when a crowded one-directional flow (all indicators agree) coincides with a structural break (e.g. USDJPY LONG at 8/30 bull, 0 green_matches, hist_hr=0%): everyone is on the same side precisely because a regime is transitioning, and there is no memory to anchor the edge.
reflection.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier = 0.0  # freeze, treat as UNRELIABLE

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
